title: lantana micrantha f. violacea
intro: Lantana micrantha f. violacea is a flowering plant species, part of the verbena family (Verbenaceae), known for its vibrant purple flowers and medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Lantana micrantha f. violacea include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and providing antioxidant protection against free radicals. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
